sentences.arabic: تَبْنِي بَعْضُ الدُّوَلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ مُدُنًا ذَكِيَّةً وَمُتَطَوِّرَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Neke arapske zemlje grade veoma pametne i napredne gradove.
sentences.translationEn: Some Arab countries are building very smart and advanced cities.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ هَذِهِ الْمُدُنُ عَلَى الطَّاقَةِ النَّظِيفَةِ وَالتِّقْنِيَّاتِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi gradovi se oslanjaju na čistu energiju i moderne tehnologije.
sentences.translationEn: These cities rely on clean energy and modern technologies.

sentences.arabic: يَسْعَى الْمُهَنْدِسُونَ إِلَى تَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ الْحَيَاةِ لِلْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Inženjeri nastoje poboljšati kvalitet života za društvo.
sentences.translationEn: Engineers strive to improve the quality of life for society.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الِابْتِكَارُ يَجْذِبُ الِاسْتِثْمَارَاتِ الْعَالَمِيَّةَ إِلَى الْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova inovacija privlači globalne investicije u regiju.
sentences.translationEn: This innovation attracts global investments to the region.
